_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Ability to align diverse stakeholder interests around a shared data and AI vision, building coalitions that sustain transformation momentum through organizational changes and competing priorities.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-A-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AG-A-002 (AG, cosine: 0.417), AG-K-004 (AG, cosine: 0.384).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.2/10 (raw 0.322). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [common, intelligence, maintain, picture] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, ai, align, around, building, changes] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.864 (P=0.894, R=0.835). P exceeds R by 0.058 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 25 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.5%). "Maintain a common intelligence picture." and "Ability to align diverse stakeholder interests around a shared data and AI visio" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.422 > STS 0.322 (gap +0.100). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.6%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [common, intelligence, maintain, picture]. WIDAI terms: [ability, ai, align, around, building, changes].
